title: anthyllis nivalis
intro: Anthyllis nivalis, also known as snow-kissed kidney vetch or snow-kissed bird's-foot trefoil, is a flowering plant in the legume family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is rich in alkaloids, particularly anthylline and nivaline, which are said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis nivalis include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Anthyllis nivalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal plant have not been extensively scientifically studied.
